auditTrail.summary: Human design intent fixture accepted for deterministic producer planning.
Producer plan records proposal-only concept/design-brief dispatch.
Requirements, mechanics, scaffold, scene, and behavior stages produce fixture-scoped proposals.
Asset stage records provenance-gated fixture references only.
QA stage records deterministic local evidence before release-candidate consideration.
Release-candidate promotion is blocked by pending human release gate.

generatedStatePolicy: Generated producer demo runs, assets, content, coverage, release-candidate artifacts, and local state remain untracked unless explicitly fixture-scoped.
boundary: Deterministic fixture-scoped autonomous producer demo; Rust/local validation owns the demo evidence; browser/Studio read-only; producer outputs remain proposal-only through review/apply/trust-gradient and mandatory human gates; no network/live browser; no direct trusted writes; no auto-apply; no auto-merge; no self-approval; no reviewer bypass; no production-ready claim; no Godot replacement claim; no Godot parity claim; no quality/fun guarantee; #1 and #23 remain open.
